channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Tornadoes in Illinois and Indiana leave residents grappling with damage; cleanup efforts underway
item.description: Residents in tornado-ravaged areas in Illinois and Indiana are grappling with damage to their homes and neighborhoods after a strong line of storms barreled through communities south of Chicago.

item.title: Shooter kills 1 and injures 10 in Texas days after firing at a police officer, officials say
Roaring crowds in stars and stripes show up for the US team, and soccer’s moment in their country
